image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge.
image_prompt_characters: character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand.
image_prompt_props: prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: on table, must remain visually consistent.
image_prompt_shot: shot S027. camera intent: comic_panel_02. action beats: The floor emits a hollow sound. Protagonist A crouches and knocks on the floor. A loose wooden board is found near a table leg. narration intent: Narrator explains "地板传来空响。他蹲下敲击，桌脚旁有一块木板松了。". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "就在这里。". shot positive notes: Medium shot of a man crouching on a wooden floor, knocking on a loose board near a table leg, dim kitchen light, suspenseful mood, realistic textures, warm amber tones.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge. character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand. prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: on table, must remain visually consistent. shot S027. camera intent: comic_panel_02. action beats: The floor emits a hollow sound. Protagonist A crouches and knocks on the floor. A loose wooden board is found near a table leg. narration intent: Narrator explains "地板传来空响。他蹲下敲击，桌脚旁有一块木板松了。". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "就在这里。". shot positive notes: Medium shot of a man crouching on a wooden floor, knocking on a loose board near a table leg, dim kitchen light, suspenseful mood, realistic textures, warm amber tones.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, blurry, overexposed, cartoonish, low resolution, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

reference_images.note: wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right
table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 地板传来空响。他蹲下敲击，桌脚旁有一块木板松了。

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
